  • Calendar

EVENT CALENDAR

Henry Maier Festival Park is the setting for a series of events, concerts and ethnic and cultural festivals that attract an average of 1.2 million patrons each year. Events planned and already announced are listed below. Please check back often as more events are announced. All activities and events are subject to change without prior notice.

  • All
  • Festivals
  • Concerts
  • Special Events
  • Past Events

  • Summerfest®

    Summerfest Music Festival - June 18-20, June 25-27, and July 2-4, 2026

  • Milwaukee Dragon Boat Festival

    Milwaukee Dragon Boat Festival - July 11, 2026

  • Festa Italiana

    July 10-12, 2026

  • Family Fun Day July 19 - Family Health and Wellness

    July 19, 2026 | Family Fun Day - Family Health and Wellness Theme

  • The Strokes

    The Strokes – July 17, 2026.

  • Incredible India Festival

    July 18, 2026 | Incredible India Festival

  • German Fest

    July 24-26, 2026 | “Get Your Deutsch On” at one of the largest, most authentic HAUS parties in North America returning to Milwaukee's beautiful lakefront..

  • Black Arts Fest MKE

    August 1, 2026 | A cultural festival celebrating and showcasing African and African American culture.

  • Goo Goo Dolls

    Goo Goo Dolls – August 6, 2026.

  • Family Fun Day August 9 - STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics) theme

    August 9, 2026 | Family Fun Day - STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering, Mathematics) Theme

  • Five Finger Death Punch

    Five Finger Death Punch – August 13, 2026.

  • Irish Fest

    August 13-16, 2026 | Irish Fest, returning to Milwaukee's beautiful lakefront, has been part of the Milwaukee community for more than 30 years and the Smithsonian Institution called it "the largest and best Irish cultural event in North America." 

  • Empire of the Sun - Ask That God: Afterlife!

    Empire of the Sun – August 18, 2026.

  • Mexican Fiesta

    August 21-23, 2026 | Mexican Fiesta celebrates the sound, culture and taste of Mexico and other Latin American countries each year with three days of fun, food, Mariachi and Fiesta for everyone. Returning to Milwaukee's beautiful lakefront.

  • RÜFÜS DU SOL NORTH AMERICA 2026

    RÜFÜS DU SOL – August 26, 2026.

  • Pulse

    August 29, 2026 | FREE community event!

  • Brad Paisley LIVE

    Brad Paisley  – September 4, 2026.

  • Laborfest

    Laborfest - September 7, 2026

  • Puerto Rican Festival of Wisconsin

    September 12, 2026 | Puerto Rican Festival of Wisconsin

  • Family Fun Day September 13 - Celebrating Performing Arts

    September 13, 2026 | Family Fun Day - Celebrating Performing Arts

  • Light The Night

    September 17 | Blood Cancer United's Light The Night 

  • $UICIDEBOY$

    $UICIDEBOY$ – September 18, 2026.

  • Freshwater Food & Wine Festival

    September 19-20, 2026 | Freshwater Food & Wine Festival

  • American Heart Walk

    American Heart Walk - September 26, 2026

  • Susan G. Komen More Than Pink Southeast Wisconsin Walk®

    September 27, 2026 | Walk and fundraise to help us save lives from breast cancer.

  • Bryson Tiller

    September 29, 2026 | Bryson Tiller

  • Milwaukee Oktoberfest

    October 2-4, 2026 | Milwaukee Oktoberfest

  • Walk to End Alzheimer's

    October 3, 2026 | Walk to End Alzheimer's.

  • Making Strides Against Breast Cancer

    October 10, 2026 | The Making Strides movement raises lifesaving funds to support breast cancer patients, survivors, thrivers, and caregivers at every step of their journey. 

  • Walk MS

    May 3, 2026 |  Ending multiple sclerosis for good will take all of us. Walk MS helps us team up with friends, loved ones and co-workers to change the world for everyone affected by MS. Join us for Walk MS: Milwaukee.

  • Smoke On The Water—MKE's BBQ & Brews Fest

    May 30, 2026 |  Smoke On The Water – MKE's BBQ & Brews Fest presented by Harley-Davidson

  • UPAF Ride for the Arts

    UPAF Ride for the Arts, Sponsored by Miller Lite. Sunday, May 31, 2026

  • Pridefest

    June 4-6, 2026 | Pridefest Fest will feature a diverse lineup of entertainment focusing on local acts, performers, and shows.

  • Polish Fest

    June 12-14, 2026 | Polish Fest returns to Milwaukee's beautiful lakefront, highlighting Polish and Polish-American entertainment on five stages.

  • Summerfest® Tech

    Summerfest Tech will take place June 23 - June 26, 2026 and remain FREE of charge. 
Get in touch with us

639 E. Summerfest Place
Milwaukee, WI 53202 USA
